LanguageData.Ancients.label: Controlled Vault
LanguageData.AncientsHostile.label: Crazed Vault
LanguageData.Entities.label: Cryptids
LanguageData.FalloutTribalClan.description: Descendants of vault dwellers or surface survivors who abandoned technology generations ago. They worship spirits of the old world and wield makeshift weapons crafted from scrap and bone.
LanguageData.FalloutTribalClan.label: wasteland tribe
LanguageData.HHTools_Arizona_Civil.description: The Civil Arizona Settlement is a faction of survivors and settlers who have banded together to rebuild society in the aftermath of a devastating conflict. They are known for their resourcefulness, resilience, and commitment to community values. The CCS emphasizescooperation and mutual aid among its members, striving to create a safe and prosperous environment despite the challenges they face in the post-apocalyptic world.
LanguageData.HHTools_Arizona_Civil.label: Civil Arizona Settlement
LanguageData.HHTools_Arizona_Raider.description: The Arizona Raider Gang thrives on chaos and plunder. Forged in the ashes of civilization, they scavenge, raid, and rule through fear. Their members are scarred, loud, and proud of their savagery, painting their armor with the symbols of past kills. They move in convoys of patched-together vehicles, hitting trade routes and settlements for supplies, slaves, or sport. To them, the wasteland isnâ€™t a tragedy â€” itâ€™s freedom without rules.
LanguageData.HHTools_Arizona_Raider.label: Arizona Raider
LanguageData.HHTools_Arizona_Rough.description: The Rough Arizona Settlement is a loose collection of survivors hardened by the wastelandâ€™s brutality. They value grit over grace, and survival over civility. Life here is harsh â€” trade is bartered through intimidation, disputes are settled with fists or gunfire, and law depends on whoâ€™s standing last. Despite their rough edges, theyâ€™ve carved out a functioning, if volatile, society where toughness earns respect and weakness finds no quarter.
LanguageData.HHTools_Arizona_Rough.label: Rough Arizona Settlement
LanguageData.HHTools_Arizona_Tribal.description: The Arizona Tribe traces its roots to survivors who turned back to the old ways when the world fell apart. They live close to the land, guided by oral tradition, ancestor worship, and a deep respect for the cycles of nature. Though primitive by modern standards, they are skilled hunters, gatherers, and healers who blend salvaged pre-war tools with tribal craftsmanship. They defend their territory fiercely but trade fairly with outsiders â€” if they prove worthy of trust.
LanguageData.HHTools_Arizona_Tribal.label: Arizona Tribe
LanguageData.HHTools_California_Civil.description: The Civil California Settlement is a faction of survivors and settlers who have banded together to rebuild society in the aftermath of a devastating conflict. They are known for their resourcefulness, resilience, and commitment to community values. The CCS emphasizes cooperation and mutual aid among its members, striving to create a safe and prosperous environment despite the challenges they face in the post-apocalyptic world.
LanguageData.HHTools_California_Civil.label: Civil California Settlement
LanguageData.HHTools_California_Raider.description: The California Raider Gang thrives on chaos and plunder. Forged in the ashes of civilization, they scavenge, raid, and rule through fear. Their members are scarred, loud, and proud of their savagery, painting their armor with the symbols of past kills. They move in convoys of patched-together vehicles, hitting trade routes and settlements for supplies, slaves, or sport. To them, the wasteland isnâ€™t a tragedy â€” itâ€™s freedom without rules.
LanguageData.HHTools_California_Raider.label: California Raider
LanguageData.HHTools_California_Rough.description: The Rough California Settlement is a loose collection of survivors hardened by the wastelandâ€™s brutality. They value grit over grace, and survival over civility. Life here is harsh â€” trade is bartered through intimidation, disputes are settled with fists or gunfire, and law depends on whoâ€™s standing last. Despite their rough edges, theyâ€™ve carved out a functioning, if volatile, society where toughness earns respect and weakness finds no quarter.
LanguageData.HHTools_California_Rough.label: Rough California Settlement
LanguageData.HHTools_California_Tribal.description: The California Tribe traces its roots to survivors who turned back to the old ways when the world fell apart. They live close to the land, guided by oral tradition, ancestor worship, and a deep respect for the cycles of nature. Though primitive by modern standards, they are skilled hunters, gatherers, and healers who blend salvaged pre-war tools with tribal craftsmanship. They defend their territory fiercely but trade fairly with outsiders â€” if they prove worthy of trust.
LanguageData.HHTools_California_Tribal.label: California Tribe
LanguageData.HHTools_Cascadia_Civil.description: The Civil Cascadia Settlement is a faction of survivors and settlers who have banded together to rebuild society in the aftermath of a devastating conflict. They are known for their resourcefulness, resilience, and commitment to community values. The CCS emphasizes cooperation and mutual aid among its members, striving to create a safe and prosperous environment despite the challenges they face in the post-apocalyptic world.
LanguageData.HHTools_Cascadia_Civil.label: Civil Cascadia Settlement

Their members are scarred, loud, and proud of their savagery, painting their armor with the symbols of past kills. They move in convoys of patched-together vehicles, hitting trade routes and settlements for supplies, slaves, or sport. To them, the wasteland isnâ€™t a tragedy â€” itâ€™s freedom without rules.
LanguageData.HHTools_Cascadia_Raider.label: Cascadia Raider

Life here is harsh â€” trade is bartered through intimidation, disputes are settled with fists or gunfire, and law depends on whoâ€™s standing last. Despite their rough edges, theyâ€™ve carved out a functioning, if volatile, society where toughness earns respect and weakness finds no quarter.
LanguageData.HHTools_Cascadia_Rough.label: Rough Cascadia Settlement

They live close to the land, guided by oral tradition, ancestor worship, and a deep respect for the cycles of nature. Though primitive by modern standards, they are skilled hunters, gatherers, and healers who blend salvaged pre-war tools with tribal craftsmanship. They defend their territory fiercely but trade fairly with outsiders â€” if they prove worthy of trust.

Their members are scarred, loud, and proud of their savagery, painting their armor with the symbols of past kills. They move in convoys of patched-together vehicles, hitting trade routes and settlements for supplies, slaves, or sport. To them, the wasteland isnÃ¢â‚¬â„¢t a tragedy Ã¢â‚¬â€ itÃ¢â‚¬â„¢s freedom without rules.
LanguageData.HHTools_Mutant_Army.label: Raider Mutant Army
LanguageData.HHTools_Mutant_Critter.description: The Mutant Tribe traces its roots to survivors who turned back to the old ways when the world fell apart. They live close to the land, guided by oral tradition, ancestor worship, and a deep respect for the cycles of nature. Though primitive by modern standards, they are skilled hunters, gatherers, and healers who blend salvaged pre-war tools with tribal craftsmanship. They defend their territory fiercely but trade fairly with outsiders Ã¢â‚¬â€ if they prove worthy of trust.
LanguageData.HHTools_Mutant_Critter.label: Gentile Mutant Tribe
LanguageData.HHTools_Mutant_Ghoul.description: The Civil Mutant Settlement is a faction of survivors and settlers who have banded together to rebuild society in the aftermath of a devastating conflict. They are known for their resourcefulness, resilience, and commitment to community values. The CCS emphasizes cooperation and mutual aid among its members, striving to create a safe and prosperous environment despite the challenges they face in the post-apocalyptic world.
LanguageData.HHTools_Mutant_Ghoul.label: Civil Ghoul Ghosttown

They live close to the land, guided by oral tradition, ancestor worship, and a deep respect for the cycles of nature. Though primitive by modern standards, they are skilled hunters, gatherers, and healers who blend salvaged pre-war tools with tribal craftsmanship. They defend their territory fiercely but trade fairly with outsiders Ã¢â‚¬â€ if they prove worthy of trust.
LanguageData.HHTools_Mutant_Numen.label: Gentile Numen Tribe

They live close to the land, guided by oral tradition, ancestor worship, and a deep respect for the cycles of nature. Though primitive by modern standards, they are skilled hunters, gatherers, and healers who blend salvaged pre-war tools with tribal craftsmanship. They defend their territory fiercely but trade fairly with outsiders Ã¢â‚¬â€ if they prove worthy of trust.
LanguageData.HHTools_Mutant_Slanter.label: Gentile Slanter Tribe

They value grit over grace, and survival over civility. Life here is harsh Ã¢â‚¬â€ trade is bartered through intimidation, disputes are settled with fists or gunfire, and law depends on whoÃ¢â‚¬â„¢s standing last. Despite their rough edges, theyÃ¢â‚¬â„¢ve carved out a functioning, if volatile, society where toughness earns respect and weakness finds no quarter.
LanguageData.HHTools_Mutant_SuperMutant.label: Rough Super Mutant Stronghold
LanguageData.HHTools_NuevoTexico_Civil.description: The Civil Nuevo Texico Settlement is a faction of survivors and settlers who have banded together to rebuild society in the aftermath of a devastating conflict. They are known for their resourcefulness, resilience, and commitment to community values. The CCS emphasizes cooperation and mutual aid among its members, striving to create a safe and prosperous environment despite the challenges they face in the post-apocalyptic world.
LanguageData.HHTools_NuevoTexico_Civil.label: Civil Nuevo Texico Settlement
LanguageData.HHTools_NuevoTexico_Raider.description: The Nuevo Texico Raider Gang thrives on chaos and plunder. Forged in the ashes of civilization, they scavenge, raid, and rule through fear. Their members are scarred, loud, and proud of their savagery, painting their armor with the symbols of past kills. They move in convoys of patched-together vehicles, hitting trade routes and settlements for supplies, slaves, or sport. To them, the wasteland isnâ€™t a tragedy â€” itâ€™s freedom without rules.
LanguageData.HHTools_NuevoTexico_Raider.label: Texico Raider
LanguageData.HHTools_NuevoTexico_Rough.description: The Rough Nuevo Texico Settlement is a loose collection of survivors hardened by the wastelandâ€™s brutality. They value grit over grace, and survival over civility. Life here is harsh â€” trade is bartered through intimidation, disputes are settled with fists or gunfire, and law depends on whoâ€™s standing last. Despite their rough edges, theyâ€™ve carved out a functioning, if volatile, society where toughness earns respect and weakness finds no quarter.
LanguageData.HHTools_NuevoTexico_Rough.label: Rough Nuevo Texico Settlement
LanguageData.HHTools_NuevoTexico_Tribal.description: The Nuevo Texico Tribe traces its roots to survivors who turned back to the old ways when the world fell apart. They live close to the land, guided by oral tradition, ancestor worship, and a deep respect for the cycles of nature. Though primitive by modern standards, they are skilled hunters, gatherers, and healers who blend salvaged pre-war tools with tribal craftsmanship. They defend their territory fiercely but trade fairly with outsiders â€” if they prove worthy of trust.
LanguageData.HHTools_NuevoTexico_Tribal.label: Texico Tribe
LanguageData.HHTools_Raider.description: Ruthless scavengers and murderers who live for the thrill of domination. They often mark their armor with blood and chems, worshiping violence as the only truth.
LanguageData.HHTools_Raider.label: wasteland raider gang
LanguageData.HoraxCult.label: Holy Mothman Cultsts
LanguageData.Insect.description: Ruthless and unyielding, the Antagonizer is a force of destruction and discord. Their motives shrouded in darkness, they seek power through chaos, crushing all opposition without mercy. Cross their path, and youâ€™ll know true enmity in the wasteland.
LanguageData.Insect.label: Antagonizer
LanguageData.OutlanderRefugee.description: Flesh freed from chains, the Escaped Slaves bear scars both seen and unseen. Bonded by suffering and driven by hope, they struggle for freedom and justice amidst the wastelandâ€™s cruelty. Fierce and desperate, they fight for a life stolen but not forgotten.
LanguageData.OutlanderRefugee.label: Escaped Slaves
LanguageData.Pilgrims.description: Guardians of ancient wisdom, the Wise Mothman Cultists follow the elusive protector as a guide against the wastelandâ€™s creeping horrors. Calm and watchful, they seek balance between man and myth, standing sentinel against the chaos that threatens to consume all.
LanguageData.Pilgrims.label: Wise Mothman Cultists
LanguageData.PlayerColony.description: A new settlement of various outcasts and wanderers.
LanguageData.PlayerColony.label: new settlement
LanguageData.PlayerTribe.label: new tribe
LanguageData.ResearchExpedition.label: New Cult
LanguageData.Salvagers.description: The Enclave Radicals burn with fanatic fire, wielding doctrine like a blade. Purity, dominance, and absolute control drive them to purge what they deem impure. Their zeal knows no bounds, turning even allies into enemies in their relentless crusade.
LanguageData.Salvagers.label: Enclave Radicals
LanguageData.Sanguophages.description: In the frozen wilds, the Wendigo Cultists whisper dark rites to the ancient spirit of hunger and death. Their bones chilled by bitter winds, they embrace the curse of the Wendigo with fevered devotion. Beware their wild eyes â€” they hunger not just for flesh, but for souls.
LanguageData.Sanguophages.label: Wendigo Cultsts
LanguageData.TradersGuild.description: Scattered and hunted, the Enclave Remnants cling to the last fragments of a fallen empire. Proud and unbroken, they uphold their sacred mission: to reclaim humanity through strength and technology. Their shadows stretch long, shaped by secrets and betrayal.
LanguageData.TradersGuild.label: Enclave Remnants
